title: Beefus3385's De Extinction
description: A mod that atempts to bring back extinct life (including Dinosaurus) from the UK.
body:
Beefus3385's De Extinction is a mod for Minecraft Java Edition
made by me (Beefus3385) that atempts to bring back many
extinct plants and animals from across the UK. So far the mod
is creative only so if you want to see the creatures you will need
to spawn them in in creative. But in the future I'm planning to
add Survival mode support so you can get the creatures in
survival by bringing them back to life. Currently the mod only has 3 Dinosaurs: Iguanodon, Megolasaurus and Cetiosaurus. Of course the will be more in the future.
